title: Suki's Sleepover Surprise
synopsis: Suki is nervous about her first sleepover at her friend Maya's house, but with help from her little brother and some silly games, she discovers that trying new things can lead to wonderful friendships and fun adventures.

pages.text: Suki held the sparkly invitation in her hands. It was from her friend Maya. "Come to my sleepover!" it said in purple letters. Suki felt her tummy do little flips. She had never been to a sleepover before.

illustration.description: A young Japanese girl with shoulder-length black hair and big brown eyes holds a glittery purple invitation card. She looks excited but nervous, standing in a bright kitchen with yellow walls. Sunlight streams through a window, creating warm golden tones.
illustration.alt: Suki holding a sparkly sleepover invitation looking nervous but excited

pages.text: "Mom!" Suki called. "Maya wants me to sleep over at her house!" Mom smiled. "That sounds fun, sweetie. Are you excited?" Suki nodded, but her smile felt wobbly. What if she got scared? What if she wanted to come home?

illustration.description: Suki shows the invitation to her mom, a kind-looking woman with warm brown skin and curly black hair tied in a bun. They're in a cozy living room with soft blue couches and colorful throw pillows. Mom has a gentle, encouraging expression.
illustration.alt: Suki showing the invitation to her supportive mother in their living room

pages.text: Her little brother Kenji bounced over. "Sleepover? Can I come too?" he asked. "It's just for Maya and me," Suki said. Kenji made a silly face. "Then I'll have the whole room to myself! I can do my robot dance all night!" He wiggled his arms like a robot.

illustration.description: A cheerful little boy with black hair and big expressive eyes does a silly robot dance, arms bent at odd angles. Suki giggles in the background. The room is bright and playful with colorful toys scattered around and rainbow wall decals.
illustration.alt: Kenji doing a funny robot dance while Suki watches and laughs

pages.text: That night, Suki packed her purple backpack. She put in her pajamas, toothbrush, and her favorite stuffed elephant, Peanut. "What if I can't sleep?" she asked Peanut. Peanut didn't answer, but his soft trunk felt comforting.

illustration.description: Suki sits on her bed packing a purple backpack, holding a small gray stuffed elephant. Her bedroom has soft pink walls with star stickers and a cozy bed with rainbow sheets. The lamp casts a warm, gentle glow over the scene.
illustration.alt: Suki packing her backpack with her stuffed elephant Peanut

pages.text: Kenji peeked into her room. "Are you talking to Peanut again?" Suki blushed. "Maybe." "That's okay," Kenji said. "I talk to my dinosaur. He gives great advice about being brave." "Really?" Suki asked. "What does he say?"

illustration.description: Kenji stands in the doorway holding a bright green toy dinosaur, grinning mischievously. Suki sits on her bed looking curious. The hallway behind Kenji is softly lit, and family photos line the walls in colorful frames.
illustration.alt: Kenji in the doorway holding his toy dinosaur while talking to Suki

pages.text: "He says being scared is normal. But the best adventures happen when you're a little scared!" Kenji made his dinosaur roar softly. "Plus, Maya is really nice. Remember when she shared her cookies with everyone?" Suki smiled. Maya was nice.

illustration.description: The two siblings sit together on Suki's bed, with Kenji making his dinosaur 'talk' to Peanut the elephant. Both children are smiling, and the room feels warm and safe with soft lighting and cozy blankets around them.
illustration.alt: Suki and Kenji sitting together with their stuffed animals having a heart-to-heart talk

pages.text: The next evening, Dad drove Suki to Maya's house. Maya ran out to meet them. "Suki! You're here!" Maya had curly red hair and freckles. She bounced on her toes. "We're going to have so much fun!" Behind her stood her dad, a tall man with kind eyes.

illustration.description: A girl with vibrant red curly hair and freckles waves excitedly in front of a cheerful yellow house with a red door. Her father, a tall Black man with glasses and a warm smile, stands behind her. Suki waves back from a blue car.
illustration.alt: Maya and her dad greeting Suki at their bright yellow house

pages.text: Inside, Maya's house smelled like pizza and felt cozy. "We made a blanket fort in my room!" Maya said, grabbing Suki's hand. The fort was made of colorful blankets and pillows. It looked like a rainbow cave. "This is amazing!" Suki said.

illustration.description: Two girls crawl into a magnificent blanket fort made of rainbow-colored sheets and fluffy pillows. String lights twinkle inside the fort, creating a magical glow. The bedroom has lavender walls and stuffed animals peeking out from shelves.
illustration.alt: Suki and Maya exploring their colorful blanket fort with twinkling lights

pages.text: They ate pizza for dinner with Maya's family. Maya's little sister Zoe made funny faces with her pizza slices. "Look! Pizza mustache!" Zoe held a slice under her nose. Everyone laughed, including Suki. Her worried feeling started to fade away.

illustration.description: A happy family dinner scene around a wooden table with pizza boxes. A small girl with pigtails holds pizza like a mustache while everyone laughs. The dining room is warm with orange walls and family photos, creating a joyful atmosphere.
illustration.alt: Family dinner with Zoe making everyone laugh with her pizza mustache

pages.text: In the blanket fort, Maya and Suki told jokes and shared stories. "I was nervous about tonight," Suki admitted. "Me too!" Maya said. "I've never had a sleepover either! But this is the best night ever." They giggled and high-fived.

illustration.description: Inside the cozy blanket fort, two girls sit cross-legged facing each other, high-fiving with big smiles. Soft fairy lights create a magical atmosphere around them, and stuffed animals sit nearby as silent witnesses to their growing friendship.
illustration.alt: Suki and Maya high-fiving inside their blanket fort, both looking happy and relaxed

pages.text: When it was time for bed, they brushed their teeth together and put on their pajamas. Maya's were covered in stars, and Suki's had little elephants on them. "Just like Peanut!" Maya said, hugging Suki's stuffed elephant. "Can Peanut meet my bear, Honey?"

illustration.description: Two girls in cute pajamas sit on a fluffy rug, introducing their stuffed animals. One holds a gray elephant, the other a golden teddy bear. The bedroom is softly lit with a nightlight casting gentle shadows on the walls.
illustration.alt: Suki and Maya in pajamas introducing their stuffed animals to each other

pages.text: The next morning, Dad came to pick up Suki. "Did you have fun?" he asked. "The best time ever!" Suki hugged Maya goodbye. "Can we do this again?" Maya asked. "Yes!" said Suki. "And next time, maybe at my house!" She felt proud and happy. Sleepovers weren't scary after all.

illustration.description: Two friends share a warm hug goodbye on the front porch of the yellow house. Both girls are beaming with joy, and Maya's family waves from the doorway. The morning sun creates a golden, happy glow over the entire scene.
illustration.alt: Suki and Maya hugging goodbye with big smiles as their families watch

metadata.illustrationStyle: Playful storybook illustration style. Rich saturated colors. Expressive characters with big eyes. Whimsical, like Pixar concept art.

questions.question: How did Suki feel when she first got Maya's invitation?
questions.explanation: Suki felt excited about the invitation but also nervous because she had never been to a sleepover before.

questions.question: What is the name of Suki's stuffed animal?
questions.explanation: Suki's favorite stuffed elephant is named Peanut, and she takes him with her to the sleepover.

questions.question: What did Kenji do to make Suki feel better?
choices: He shared advice from his dinosaur toy
questions.explanation: Kenji helped Suki by sharing advice from his toy dinosaur about being brave and having adventures.

questions.question: What did Maya and Suki build in Maya's room?
questions.explanation: Maya and Suki made a colorful blanket fort with pillows that looked like a rainbow cave.

questions.question: How did Suki feel about sleepovers at the end of the story?
choices: Happy and excited to do it again
questions.explanation: By the end, Suki realized sleepovers weren't scary and she wanted to have another one at her own house.

pages.title: Fill in the Missing Words
pages.instructions: Choose the correct word to complete each sentence from the story.
sentences: Suki held the sparkly _______ in her hands.
Her little brother Kenji did a silly _______ dance.
They made a _______ fort in Maya's room.

pages.title: More Missing Words
pages.instructions: Pick the right word to finish these sentences.
sentences: Suki packed her favorite stuffed _______, Peanut.
Maya's little sister Zoe made funny faces with her _______ slices.
The next morning, Suki felt _______ and happy.
